query:
SELECT 
  emissor_nome,
  codigo_cetip,
  indexador,
  incentivado,
  CAST(taxa_indicativa AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as taxa_indicativa,
  CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as zspread,
  CAST(spread_incentivado_sem_gross_up AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as spread_gross_up,
  CAST(duration_anos AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as duration_anos,
  data_vencimento,
  rating
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE incentivado = 1 
  AND spread_incentivado_sem_gross_up IS NOT NULL
  AND spread_incentivado_sem_gross_up > 0
  AND zspread IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY spread_incentivado_sem_gross_up DESC
LIMIT 10;
